# solutions.csv

**Generated by:** [`map_solutions_connectors_tables.py`](../map_solutions_connectors_tables.md)
**Granularity:** One row per solution (every solution under `Solutions/`, including those without data connectors)
**Type:** Entity table

## Overview

Flattened solution metadata combining `SolutionMetadata.json` and `Data/Solution_*.json` with full Azure Marketplace metadata fetched from the Marketplace Catalog API. Includes deprecation flags, dependencies, popularity, ratings, and pricing model.

## Use Cases

- **Solution inventory and reporting** — full list of solutions with publisher, support tier, version, and category.
- **Marketplace presence and popularity** — sort by `mp_popularity` or `mp_rating_average` to surface most-used solutions; filter by `mp_is_published` for live solutions only.
- **Deprecation tracking** — `is_deprecated` + `deprecation_date` for solution lifecycle reporting; cascades to all child connectors.
- **Support tier filtering** — separate Microsoft / Partner / Community solutions via `solution_support_tier`.
- **Dependency graphing** — `solution_dependencies` lists `publisherId.offerId` of explicit dependencies; combine with [`solution_dependencies.csv`](solution_dependencies.md) for resolved names.
- **Marketplace listing audit** — verify that solutions display correctly on the Marketplace (`mp_display_name`, `mp_summary`, `mp_categories`, `mp_keywords`).
- **Pricing model audit** — `mp_is_free`, `mp_is_byol`, `mp_is_microsoft_product`.
- **Kusto upload** — uploaded as `solution_analyzer_solutions_lookup` by `upload_to_kusto.py`.

## Columns

### Core solution metadata

| Column | Description | Data Source |
|--------|-------------|-------------|
| `solution_name` | Official solution name (or folder name fallback) | Solution JSON `Name` |
| `solution_folder` | Solution folder name | File system |
| `solution_github_url` | Full GitHub URL to the solution's folder | Computed |
| `solution_publisher_id` | Publisher ID. Overridable via `Solution,<pattern>,solution_publisher_id,<value>` to redirect the marketplace lookup (applied before the marketplace check) | SolutionMetadata.json `publisherId` |
| `solution_offer_id` | Offer ID. Overridable via `Solution,<pattern>,solution_offer_id,<value>` to redirect the marketplace lookup (applied before the marketplace check) | SolutionMetadata.json `offerId` |
| `solution_first_publish_date` | First publication date | SolutionMetadata.json `firstPublishDate` |
| `solution_last_publish_date` | Last update date | SolutionMetadata.json `lastPublishDate` |
| `solution_version` | Solution version | Solution JSON `Version` or SolutionMetadata.json `version` |
| `solution_support_name` | Support provider name | SolutionMetadata.json `support.name` |
| `solution_support_tier` | Support tier (Microsoft, Partner, Community) | SolutionMetadata.json `support.tier` |
| `solution_support_link` | Support link URL | SolutionMetadata.json `support.link` |
| `solution_author_name` | Author name | Solution JSON `Author` |
| `solution_categories` | Comma-separated category labels (the flattened **values** of the `categories` object — domain labels first, then verticals — e.g. `Security - Threat Protection,Identity`), not the `domains`/`verticals` keys | SolutionMetadata.json `categories` |
| `solution_readme_file` | Path to solution README (if exists) | File system |
| `solution_logo_url` | URL to solution logo (extracted from HTML img in Logo field) | Solution JSON `Logo` |
| `solution_description` | Full solution description | Solution JSON `Description` |
| `solution_dependencies` | Semicolon-separated `publisherId.offerId` of dependent solutions | Solution JSON `dependentDomainSolutionIds` |
| `has_connectors` | `true` if solution has data connectors | Computed |
| `is_deprecated` | `true` if description contains deprecation language | Regex; overridable |
| `deprecation_date` | Extracted date when deprecated | Regex; overridable |

### Legacy marketplace fields (kept for backward compatibility)

| Column | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `is_published` | `true` if solution is published on Azure Marketplace |
| `marketplace_url` | URL to the Marketplace listing |

### Marketplace metadata (`mp_*`) — from Azure Marketplace Catalog API

| Column | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `mp_is_published` | `true` if solution exists on Azure Marketplace |
| `mp_url` | Direct URL to the marketplace listing |
| `mp_display_name` | Marketplace display name |
| `mp_summary` | Short summary text |
| `mp_long_summary` | Extended summary text |
| `mp_publisher_display_name` | Publisher display name |
| `mp_is_preview` | `true`/`false` — preview listing |
| `mp_is_stop_sell` | `true`/`false` — delisted/stop-sell |
| `mp_creation_date` | Listing creation date (YYYY-MM-DD) |
| `mp_last_modified_date` | Last modification date (YYYY-MM-DD) |
| `mp_categories` | Semicolon-separated marketplace category IDs |
| `mp_keywords` | Semicolon-separated keywords |
| `mp_popularity` | Popularity score (0–1, higher = more popular) |
| `mp_rating_average` | Average user rating (0–5) |
| `mp_rating_count` | Total number of ratings |
| `mp_is_free` | `true` if first plan is free |
| `mp_is_byol` | `true` if bring-your-own-license |
| `mp_is_microsoft_product` | `true` if listed as a Microsoft product |
| `mp_last_checked` | Date when marketplace data was last fetched |

See [`map_solutions_connectors_tables.md` › Azure Marketplace Availability](../map_solutions_connectors_tables.md#azure-marketplace-availability) for caching and refresh details.

## Related CSVs

- [`connectors.csv`](connectors.md) — connectors of each solution; join on `solution_name`.
- [`solution_dependencies.csv`](solution_dependencies.md) — resolved dependency relationships.
- [`content_items.csv`](content_items.md) — content shipped with each solution.
